notes: Named after St. John's Day (Johannistag, 24 June), when the berries ripen. 'Schwarze Johannisbeere' = blackcurrant; 'rote Johannisbeere' = redcurrant.

sentences.german: Ich habe im Garten viele Johannisbeeren gepflückt.
sentences.english: I picked a lot of currants in the garden.

sentences.german: Aus roten Johannisbeeren macht man oft Marmelade oder Saft.
sentences.english: Red currants are often used to make jam or juice.
